arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Man City: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Man City visit Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Saturday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: 'I had to quit Everton - now Arne Slot wants Liverpool to sign me before Man City do'
arts.sum: Antonee Robinson has become one of the Premier League's most highly-rated full-backs since parting ways with Everton in 2019, and Arne Slot is said to be eyeing a bid for the USA international

arts.ttl: Savinho: We have our confidence back!
arts.sum: “We knew that it was a bad run, but that everything passes, and hopefully we’re out of it now and we can follow up with three points against Crystal Palace. We have our objectives which are game by game, as Liverpool are a few points ahead of us, but we now have that win to get out of that bad run, so it’s about winning game by game and I hope we can continue like that.

arts.ttl: Report & Highlights: Valiant Palace knocked out of FA Youth Cup by holders City
arts.sum: Crystal Palace Under-18s fell in the third round of the FA Youth Cup, after a strong performance in the pouring rain at the JOIE stadium.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola says Man City ‘innocent until proven guilty’ after Mourinho jibe
arts.sum: City were charged with 115 alleged breaches of top-flight financial rules in February 2023, which the club strenuously deny.

arts.ttl: 'He's another one' - Pep Guardiola responds to Jose Mourinho's Man City 'lawsuit' claim
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho had a dig at Pep Guardiola and Manchester City this week over the club's ongoing legal fight with the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Pep: Mourinho comment was a joke - he just wants Man City in League One
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has responded following Jose Mourinho's barbed comments that he won three Premier League titles "fairly and cleanly".

arts.ttl: Glasner on defensive progress and 'finisher' Mateta
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says his side have been working hard on their defensive progress this season, rewarded by their clean sheet at Portman Road - but that facing Manchester City will be one of their toughest tests of the season.

arts.ttl: Man City boss Pep Guardiola fires back at old rival Jose Mourinho's 115 charges jibe
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola claims Jose Mourinho is just "another one on the huge list" who want to see Manchester City relegated because of their 115 Premier League charges

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner makes squad depth admission
arts.sum: The Austrian manager has been on record throughout the season that they saw the smaller squad size as an opportunity for players from the academy setup. “I think it was the right decision because maybe Justin Devenny wouldn’t have gotten the chance, and he’s been excellent,” said Glasner.
